rule_metadata.author: Austin Songer @austinsonger
rule_metadata.title: Google Cloud DNS Zone Modified or Deleted

rules.rule_text:
title: Google Cloud DNS Zone Modified or Deleted
id: 28268a8f-191f-4c17-85b2-f5aa4fa829c3
status: test
description: Identifies when a DNS Zone is modified or deleted in Google Cloud.
references:
- https://cloud.google.com/dns/docs/reference/v1/managedZones
author: Austin Songer @austinsonger
date: 2021-08-15
modified: 2022-10-09
tags:
- attack.impact
logsource:
  product: gcp
  service: gcp.audit
detection:
  selection:
    gcp.audit.method_name:
    - Dns.ManagedZones.Delete
    - Dns.ManagedZones.Update
    - Dns.ManagedZones.Patch
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: medium
